intro: Pleurostima delicatula, also known as the "Delicate Pleurostima" or "Delicate Climbing Violet", is a flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Borneo and Sumatra. The health benefits of Pleurostima delicatula include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, thanks to its rich content of antioxidants and flavonoids.
